📍Crumbs & Doilies, Carnaby street  First time trying crumbs & doilies along with their new special matcha and I was so pleasantly surprised by how good everything was! The matcha quality was genuinely so good and it’s not too sweet when u mix it🍵 If u have a sweet tooth u would defo love this along with their selection of various cakes and cookies🍪  Don’t miss out on the birthday cake matcha as it’s only here until the end of June! @Crumbs & Doilies  💌Invite but genuinely soo good and only giving the realest reviews #cutecafe #cafe #matcha #cafelondon #matchaspots

@ONSU  is a viral Soho spot specialising in artisanal Asian baking mixed with French pastry techniques. 🥐✨ What we ordered: 🍵 Matcha Tiramisu Latte. A velvety fusion where rich tiramisu flavour doesn't overpower the earthy matcha. 🍓 Strawberry Matcha Latte A vibrant, fruity layer of bold matcha over sweet, jammy strawberry purée. 🍰 Red Fruit Mille-feuille Delicate layers of shatteringly crisp pastry, silky cream, and tart berries. ☁️ Vanilla & Strawberry Cheesecake A cloud-like, mousse-soft vanilla cheesecake filled with juicy fresh strawberries. 📍Onsu. 55A Dean Street. Soho.  #soho #bakery #london #FoodTok #Foodie

📍Wuxian (Shaftesbury Ave) The heat lately has had me craving iced drinks nonstop so we ended up trying a few bubble teas 🧋✨ We got: 🍇 Grape Lime Tea 🥜 Pistachio Tofu Pudding Milk Tea 🧋 Classic Boba Milk Tea with Brûlée The classic boba with brûlée was definitely my fave 👀 The pistachio one was nice too because it wasn’t overly sweet and had a slight salty hint to it. I just wish the pistachio flavour itself was a little stronger. Honestly all of them were really refreshing for the weather. Cute area to just sit around, relax and people watch for a bit too 🫶  (Invite 💌) #bubbletea #soho #wuxian #londonfood #londonfoodie

📍 Puffy, Soho. I wanted to check out this viral cookie shop and wow it exceeded expectations. There were so many flavours to pick from. We went for a Double Chocolate Hazelnut Cookie with Soft Serve Ice Cream and a Milk Chocolate Cookie. They were both absolutely delicious. It was more of a cakey consistency so the soft ice cream worked perfectly!! Go try the viral Puffy cookies asap!! #Puffy #viralcookie #Soho #london #londoneats

Thank you Parveen for reaching out and bringing us to some of your favourite spots in London! 💛 First stop was Laksamania (check our previous video!) and for dessert, she took us to  📍Bilmonte in Soho 🍦✨ Parveen went for her go-to order — extra dark salted chocolate, white salted chocolate & the chocolate cone  We got the 3 scoops for £7.20 Bilmonte (vanilla caramel w/ caramelised nut chunks)  sweet, savoury & that crunch makes ALL the difference  Alicia 9/10  Karen 7.5/10 Pistachio  delicate at first, then the pistachio aftertaste hits as it melts. Alicia 8/10  Karen 7.5/10 Extra Dark Salted Chocolate (sorbet) thick, rich & deeply chocolatey. Salt compeltes it  Alicia 7/10  Karen 8.5/10 Chocolate Cone love how the milk chocolate hardens as you dip, but it’s on the sweeter side Alicia 6/10  Karen 6/10 £7.20 for 3 scoops  DM us and let’s go eat together! Bring us to your favourite spots, or let’s find food together 🥰 @parveendee #gelato #londonfood #foodreview #Foodie #hiddengems

This place honesty made us feel like we were back in Japan! 🇯🇵  Easily made it onto our favourites list @maki & ramen has opened its first London restaurant right in the heart of Soho, bringing their popular halal-friendly menu from Scotland and across England to Old Compton Street. Everything is packed with authentic flavour — from rich homemade broths and handmade noodles to the crispy karaage and fresh sushi rolls. The halal steak ramen was unreal - you cannot leave without trying it! We also tried the spicy chicken teriyaki which was full of flavour, and the Black Dragon Sushi Roll was soooooo good!  The place is perfect for solo meals and even group settings! Whether you’re after comforting ramen, sushi, or vegan-friendly options, this place delivers. Easily one of the best new halal-friendly Japanese spots in London. 📍: Soho

I’m a Tea Sommelier and welcome to Matcha Mondays, my weekly matcha series where I make drinks using my special edition matcha.  This is a Matcha Shakerato. A shakerato is a shaken iced coffee drink but instead of espresso, I’m using matcha. It takes about a minute to make. The drink is frothy, sweet, and refreshing. It’s a fun matcha mocktail since it’s perfect for serving in a martini glass or a coupe glass. Put matcha, sugar, and hot water into a cocktail shaker. You don’t need to sift the matcha with the cocktail shaker method. Use water that’s 176°F. There is such a big taste difference between using cold water and hot water. I tested this recipe using cold water and the matcha just did not taste as good so you have to use hot water for a more balanced and nutty flavor.  Shake for 30 seconds. I like to take a look to make sure there aren’t any clumps. Open up the cocktail shaker and add ice. This is to quickly cool down the drink. Shake for another 30 seconds.  Pour the drink into a coupe glass, making sure to get every little bit of foam, but not the ice.  Is it as good as it looks? Yup.  Matcha Shakerato ½ cup hot water (176°F) 2 teaspoons matcha 1 tablespoon sugar ½ cup ice Combine matcha, sugar, and hot water into a cocktail shaker. Shake for 30 seconds or until you don’t see any clumps. Add ice and shake for another 30 seconds. Pour the drink into a coupe glass, making sure to get the matcha froth but not the ice.  #matcha #matchatea #matcharecipe #matchatok #shakerato

✨NEW✨spot for Hongkong pineapple bun (菠萝包）in London!!🇬🇧 📍 @leos_bun 🧡☁️They just opened this weekend and are serving up bolo buns in a range of different flavours🌞 My favouriteeee was the 💚Triple Matcha Bun🥹 A chunk of matcha panna cotta, fresh matcha cream all tucked in a fluffy matcha flavoured bolo bun! Left no crumbs😋 💜The taro bun came in their original bolo bun and was packed with smooth taro puree & original panna cotta🤤If you’re a taro lover, you’ll love this one! 🍋They also have the best iced lemon tea everrrr!! I’m still thinking about it🥤✨ They’re a cute little kiosk in Aldgate East, don’t forget to treat yourself a bolo bun when you’re in the area!!🧡 📍 @leos_bun  🗺️ 41a Commercial St, London E1 6BD 🐇🎀Follow for more food & travel content ♡ 🔖 London new openings | London new dessert | London new bakery | Pineapple bun | London eats | where to eat in London | what to do in London | London weekend ideas | London content creator #trending #londonfood
